title: Insight settings are being removed from software projects
description: As part of our ongoing effort to simplify project settings for admins, we're removing the option to configure insight settings in Jira software projects. Insights will continue to show as normal, but board admins and project admins won't be able to enable or disable specific insights, and any insights that were previously disabled will now be enabled. This means that all insights available in a project will be visible to any user who selects Insights from the board or backlog. To send us feedbac
